title: ctenitis tenuifrons
intro: Ctenitis tenuifrons, also known as the Chinese fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis tenuifrons include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and act as an anti-cancer agent, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Ctenitis tenuifrons can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various herbal formulas.
